**Steps to Reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'

**Actual behavior**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
If possible, add screenshots to help explain correct behaviour.

**Reference to requirement(s)**
As per [requirement](https://github.com/epam/ketcher/issues/8008):

> 1. A new option should be added to the S-group type menu - `Copolymer`, and it should become active if there are at least two structure repeating units (SRU) defined in the selected structure.

**Environment details:**
- Ketcher Version (e.g Ketcher Version 3.17.0-rc.2 Build at 2026-06-22; 16:29:18)
- Indigo Version (e.g. Indigo Version 1.45.0-rc.2.0-g168fb85f2-wasm32-wasm-clang-23.0.0)
- Browser Version (e.g. Chrome Version 149.0.7827.156 (Official Build) (64-bit))
- OS version (e.g. Win11)

**Related feature/issue**
(e.g. Related issue: https://github.com/epam/ketcher/issues/7535)
